creator: jkois@freebsd.org
text:
-----BEGIN PGP SIGNED MESSAGE-----
Hash: SHA1

As gavin@ reported, on his system Opera is working fine for the
www.FreeBSD.org website.

And there was no feedback within the last 2 months from the sender of
the PR so we have no possibilty to verify the original "problem report".

Therefore I will let this ticket time out (and close this PR) 2 weeks
from now if there is no change in the situation until then.


- -- 
 Johann Kois
 jkois(at)FreeBSD.org
 FreeBSD Documentation Project
 FreeBSD German Documentation Project - https://doc.bsdgroup.de
